overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment resembling London. The scene features wet streets reflecting an overcast sky, modern corporate architecture including a prominent 'Tidis' building, autonomous vehicles, and drones flying overhead. The character progresses from a busy multi-lane road into a landscaped pedestrian area with autumn foliage.

delivery motorcycle with rear storage box passes on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a busy multi-lane road. A tall black glass skyscraper rises on the left while a modern office complex with blue lighting sits on the right. Various vehicles including an ambulance and a futuristic autonomous truck pass by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching corporate headquarters with bus traffic

white delivery truck passes on the left followed by other traffic

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching the Tidis corporate building entrance

notable_agents.action: classic red double-decker bus driving past on the road

entered.detail: black modern corporate headquarters with large white 'Tidis' signage on facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Tidis corporate building while walking along the sidewalk. A red double-decker bus and white delivery truck pass by on the road. The tall black skyscraper recedes into the background as the Tidis building becomes the dominant feature on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped pedestrian walkway with building overhang

path curves gently to the right alongside the building

large willow tree with drooping branches overhanging the path
angular black building with gold vertical accent stripes

segments.scene_description: The character passes the Tidis building entrance and continues along a curved walkway sheltered by the building overhang. Manicured hedges and a large willow tree line the right side while the path surface remains concrete. The environment transitions from busy street to landscaped corporate grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade with autumn tree canopy

events.description: entering tree-lined pedestrian area with brick pavement and autumn foliage
passing by multiple pedestrians walking along the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking through a pedestrian area with autumn trees, navigating past other people on the brick walkway

person standing near a bench looking at their phone

wet brick pavement with distinct pattern reflecting the overcast sky
tall dark residential buildings with balconies behind the tree line

segments.scene_description: The character enters a pedestrian promenade paved with wet bricks and lined with autumn trees showing orange and yellow leaves. Several pedestrians walk along the path, some approaching and others standing. Modern apartment buildings rise behind the tree line on the left, creating a residential urban atmosphere distinct from the corporate zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked urban corridor that shifts from a generic corporate district toward the imposing presence of a specific corporate headquarters. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk, flanked by a towering black glass skyscraper on the left and a blue-lit office complex on the right as an ambulance and autonomous trucks stream past. As the character progresses, the black skyscraper gradually recedes into the background, allowing the surrounding architecture to open up. The scene then shifts focus toward the Tidis corporate building, which becomes the dominant feature on the right while a red double-decker bus and delivery trucks pass by on the road.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sleek corporate plaza into a vibrant, autumn-toned residential promenade. It begins as the character passes the Tidis building entrance, moving along a curved concrete walkway sheltered by a modern overhang and lined with manicured hedges and a large willow tree. As the character leaves the corporate grounds, the environment shifts toward a pedestrian zone where the concrete gives way to wet brick paving. The scene then opens into a residential atmosphere, with the path becoming lined by trees displaying orange and yellow autumn leaves and modern apartment buildings rising in the background. Finally, the camera glides past several pedestrians strolling through this colorful urban landscape.
